name: Earl Wrightson
abstract: Earl Wrightson (January 1, 1916 – March 7, 1993) was an American singer and actor best known for musical theatre, concerts and television performances. His regular singing partner was the soprano Lois Hunt.

concerts.label: WNYC American Music Festival: U.S. Army Band and West Point Cadet Glee Club

works.t: Das Land des Lächelns: Act II. Dein ist mein ganzes Herz
Up in Central Park: She walks in the room
Zigeunerliebe: There was a little maiden
Der Ziguenerbaron: The Lion Tamer's Song

concerts.label: The American Musical Theatre in Concert with Earl Wrightson and Lois Hunt

about_quotes.speaker: Maxine Sullivan
about_quotes.evidence: I have an album with Earl Wrightson playing these tunes with the full orchestra
